name: Paul-Mattias Reitsma
title: Founder & Managing Partner
background: Background in Theology, Hermeneutics and Leadership (Universities of Amsterdam, Leuven and Oxford). Relational, entrepreneurial and encouraging. Thinks outside established frameworks. Has lived in 7 countries and speaks 3 languages fluently.

name: William Masquelier
title: Data Analyst & Research Associate
background: Erasmus University Rotterdam. Extensive experience distilling complex datasets into actionable strategic insights. Develops analytical frameworks using traditional statistical methods and AI-driven models. Oracle SCM certified, Scrum Master certified.
